mapper.select: SELECT s.spot_id AS id, s.name AS name, s.category AS scene_type, s.category AS category, s.hotness AS heat, s.rating AS rating, s.description AS description, nc.latitude AS latitude, nc.longitude AS longitude FROM spots s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_name, AVG(y) AS latitude, AVG(x) AS longitude FROM nodes WHERE y IS NOT NULL AND x IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_name ) nc ON nc.spot_name = s.name ORDER BY COALESCE(s.hotness, 0) DESC, COALESCE(s.rating, 0) DESC

SELECT s.spot_id AS id, s.name AS name, s.category AS sceneType, s.category AS category, s.hotness AS heat, s.rating AS rating, s.description AS description, nc.latitude AS latitude, nc.longitude AS longitude FROM spots s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_name, AVG(y) AS latitude, AVG(x) AS longitude FROM nodes WHERE y IS NOT NULL AND x IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_name ) nc ON nc.spot_name = s.name WHERE s.spot_id = #{id}

SELECT s.spot_id AS id, s.name AS name, s.category AS scene_type, s.category AS category, s.hotness AS heat, s.rating AS rating, s.description AS description, nc.latitude AS latitude, nc.longitude AS longitude FROM spots s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_name, AVG(y) AS latitude, AVG(x) AS longitude FROM nodes WHERE y IS NOT NULL AND x IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_name ) nc ON nc.spot_name = s.name WHERE LOWER(s.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(s.category) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(s.keywords) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ORDER BY COALESCE(s.hotness, 0) DESC, COALESCE(s.rating, 0) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO destination(name, scene_type, category, heat, rating, description, latitude, longitude) VALUES(#{name}, #{sceneType}, #{category}, #{heat}, #{rating}, #{description}, #{latitude}, #{longitude})
mapper.update: UPDATE destination SET name = #{name}, scene_type = #{sceneType}, category = #{category}, heat = #{heat}, rating = #{rating}, description = #{description}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE id = #{id}
